notes: Reproduced as reported. SKMatrix.MakeIdentity(), MakeTranslation(), MakeScale(), MakeRotation() were renamed to Create* equivalents in SkiaSharp 3.0, and static PostConcat(ref, matrix) became instance PostConcat(matrix). These are intentional breaking changes documented in changelogs/SkiaSharp/3.0.0/SkiaSharp.breaking.md. The old APIs were marked [Obsolete] in 2.88.9 with clear migration messages. This is working-as-designed — the reporter needs to update code to use the new API names.

versionResults.notes: All 5 compiler errors reproduced: 4x CS0117 for Make* methods, 1x CS1501 for static PostConcat.
Same 4 CS0117 errors on latest stable. API rename is permanent.
Source inspection confirms Make* methods fully removed, Create* replacements present. PostConcat is instance method with 1 arg. API rename is permanent.
Old APIs compile with [Obsolete] warnings pointing to Create* replacements. This is the last version supporting the old API names.

corrections.corrected: Triage correctly classified as question/breaking-change. Reproduction confirms all 5 errors occur as reported.

actionability.reason: Intentional breaking change in SkiaSharp 3.0. Old Make* APIs were marked [Obsolete] in 2.88.x with clear migration messages, then removed in 3.0. Maintainer has already responded.

actions.description: Reclassify as type/question since this is a migration issue, not a bug
Close as answered — maintainer already responded with explanation

proposedResponse.body:
### Reproduction Result: Confirmed (Breaking Change)

I reproduced all 5 compiler errors on SkiaSharp 3.119.0 and 3.119.2. These are **intentional API renames** introduced in SkiaSharp 3.0, not bugs.

#### Migration Guide

| Old API (2.88.x) | New API (3.x) |
|---|---|
| `SKMatrix.MakeIdentity()` | `SKMatrix.CreateIdentity()` |
| `SKMatrix.MakeTranslation(x, y)` | `SKMatrix.CreateTranslation(x, y)` |
| `SKMatrix.MakeScale(sx, sy, px, py)` | `SKMatrix.CreateScale(sx, sy, px, py)` |
| `SKMatrix.MakeRotation(r, px, py)` | `SKMatrix.CreateRotation(r, px, py)` |
| `SKMatrix.PostConcat(ref m, other)` | `m = m.PostConcat(other)` |

The old APIs were marked `[Obsolete]` in 2.88.9 with messages pointing to the new names, then fully removed in 3.0. The breaking changes are documented in the [3.0.0 changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/blob/main/changelogs/SkiaSharp/3.0.0/SkiaSharp.breaking.md).

**Verified:** SkiaSharp 2.88.9 compiles with the old APIs (with obsolete warnings), confirming the migration path.

workarounds: Replace SKMatrix.MakeTranslation(x, y) with SKMatrix.CreateTranslation(x, y)
Replace SKMatrix.MakeScale(sx, sy, px, py) with SKMatrix.CreateScale(sx, sy, px, py)
Replace SKMatrix.MakeRotation(r, px, py) with SKMatrix.CreateRotation(r, px, py)
Replace SKMatrix.PostConcat(ref matrix, other) with matrix = matrix.PostConcat(other)
